title: Secure Multi-Factor Login Portal

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Secure Multi-Factor Login Portal

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(100, 50)'>
<rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='100' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
<rect x='0' y='110' width='200' height='30' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<text x='15' y='25' fill='#ffffff' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>Login Portal</text>
<text x='15' y='140' fill='#ffffff' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>Choose Verification Method:</text>
<g transform='translate(40, 160)'>
<rect x='0' y='0' width='100' height='20' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<text x='15' y='0' fill='#000000' font-size='12' font-family='Arial'>SMS OTP</text>
</g>
<g transform='translate(160, 160)'>
<rect x='0' y='0' width='100' height='20' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<text x='15' y='0' fill='#000000' font-size='12' font-family='Arial'>Google Authenticator</text>
</g>
<text x='15' y='200' fill='#ffffff' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>Current Status: Logged Out</text>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must implement multi-factor authentication with SMS OTP and Google Authenticator support
Must display the current login status and verification method used
Must handle state updates for login attempts and verification methods

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Secure Multi-Factor Login Portal

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
